name: get_console_logs
description: Read log entries from the Unity Editor console. Returns errors, warnings, and/or log messages. Useful for diagnosing compilation errors, runtime exceptions, or other issues reported in the console. Results are returned newest-first.

filter.description: Optional. Which log types to include. 'errors' returns only errors and compiler errors, 'warnings' returns only warnings, 'logs' returns only info/debug messages, 'all' (default) returns everything.

max_entries.description: Optional. Maximum number of log entries to return. Defaults to 50. Use a smaller number for quick checks or a larger number for thorough investigation.
